overview: Kimi Linear (48B-A3B) is a large language model from Moonshot AI (Kimi), part of the Kimi Linear line. Released 2025-10-31. Open-weight 48B/A3B model showcasing the Kimi Delta Attention (KDA) hybrid linear-attention architecture for efficient long context.
What's notable in this version: Hybrid linear-attention model (48B total / 3B active) using Kimi Delta Attention; cuts KV cache up to 75% and reaches up to 6x decoding throughput at 1M context.
